results.title: Enabling true document AI with Tiptap AI Toolkit
results.content:

AI Toolkit

# Empower your AI to directly edit documents in real time

Talk to our team

View documentation

## Skip the hard part. Ship faster.

Chatbots are easy. Editing inside a rich-text doc – in real time, without corrupting tables or breaking on concurrent edits – is deceptively hard.

Skip months of engineering: Tiptap delivers a safe, reliable bridge between your AI and the documents where your team actually does its work.

# Want to see Tiptap’s AI Toolkit in action? Try our demo:

Schema-aware

AI patch

Reviewable

Full screen demo

## Document-aware AI editing you can trust

AI Toolkit gives your AI access to document context and structure, so it understands where changes belong and keeps edits under your users’ control. [...] Absolutely! The AI Toolkit is framework-agnostic and works with LangChain, the AI SDK by Vercel, Anthropic SDK, OpenAI or any other custom AI model or agent. Instead of rebuilding your backend you're adding document editing capabilities to your existing stack.

Once your agent has started outputting content the first token appears immediately. Users can see the progress in real-time instead of waiting for your agent to finish. With the Toolkit your agent can stream both simple content and custom React components.

The AI Toolkit augments your integrated AI agents with precise, fast document-editing capabilities, enabling them to read and write directly within your editor. [...] If you qualified for a free AI Toolkit license during our launch promotion, you’re limited to 100k tool executions per month. For more usage, contact us.

Yes, the Al Toolkit is compatible with Tiptap's collaborative backend. Multiple users can see Al streaming and edits in real-time within collaborative documents.

The AI Toolkit uses your AI provider. For portions that run on Tiptap’s servers, we are GDPR- and SOC 2-compliant. Tiptap also offers on-premise and fully client-side options for AI Toolkit; contact us for details.

Yes. You own your AI, tools, prompts, and UI. Tiptap provides tool definitions to connect your AI to documents and headless front-end functionality to support AI features.

## Create your editor with the features you want

Tiptap is the headless and open source editor framework. Integrate over 100+ extensions and paid features like collaboration and AI agents to create the UX you want.

Build AI agents that edit documents. Create chatbots, proofreaders, or multi-doc workflows. Features real-time streaming, track-changes review, and context-aware selections.

results.title: The Tiptap AI Toolkit turns your editor into an AI-native ...
results.content:
# Tiptap’s Post

Tiptap

4,984 followers

 Report this post

The Tiptap AI Toolkit turns your editor into an AI-native workspace. Your agents can read the document, understand it, and edit it directly in real time. It's the only solution for building the next generation of AI editors with full support for generating custom React nodes and collaborative editing. Works with your existing AI infrastructure (Vercel AI SDK, LangChain, Anthropic, or custom). Ships today, works standalone, no cloud dependencies. If you’ve used AI-powered editors like Cursor, you know how powerful this feels. Now you can bring that experience to your own users in any industry. 👉 See it live:

# Introducing Tiptap AI Suggestion

We're excited to announce the public beta release of the AI Suggestion feature for the Tiptap editor. Part of our Content AI toolkit, this extension enables developers to easily integrate fully customizable, secure AI-driven suggestions directly into their apps' text editors.

# AI Toolkit, now in beta – plus 100 free licenses

It’s incredibly hard to build AI agents that collaborate in documents with users, instead of siloed away in a chatbot. Tiptap’s AI Toolkit makes that easy and now, with the beta release of our server-based version, we’re giving away 100 free lifetime licenses.
